title: Generate Test Cases with Empty Requirement Description (Below Minimum String Length)
description: Verifies that the system correctly rejects an empty requirement description — representing the string length below the valid minimum boundary (0 characters) — and prevents test case generation.
expected_result: The Generate Test Cases action is blocked. A visible inline validation error appears on the requirement description field indicating that the field cannot be empty. No test cases are generated and no network request is sent to the backend.

test_steps.action: Navigate to the test case generation page
test_steps.expected: The test case generation page loads successfully

test_steps.action: Ensure the requirement description input is empty (clear any pre-filled content)
test_steps.expected: The requirement description field is empty

test_steps.action: Select a test case template from the dropdown
test_steps.expected: The template 'Functional Test Template' is selected

test_steps.action: Click the Generate Test Cases button
test_steps.expected: The system blocks submission and displays a required-field validation error

test_steps.action: Verify the validation error message text
test_steps.expected: Error message reads 'Requirement description is required' or similar
